comparison_surface_note: Compares official Play clientbound hurt_animation framed packet id and primitive body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

official_source.function_or_member: ClientboundHurtAnimationPacket(int, float), ClientboundHurtAnimationPacket.STREAM_CODEC, FriendlyByteBuf.readVarInt/writeVarInt, FriendlyByteBuf.readFloat/writeFloat, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.decorator(RegistryAccess.EMPTY)).codec().encode/decode(ClientboundHurtAnimationPacket), ClientboundHurtAnimationPacket.id(), yaw()

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Play, Direction::Clientbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Play clientbound hurt_animation framed dispatch/decode; not entity existence, hurt animation semantics, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Play clientbound hurt_animation packet framing and dispatch/decode for one primitive entity id/yaw fixture only; it does not prove entity existence, hurt animation semantics, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
